hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, os
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
path = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not path:
    sys.exit(0)
abs_path = os.path.realpath(path)
root = os.path.realpath('/home/user_1/Documents/DnD/The Wheat Sea')
rel = os.path.relpath(abs_path, root)
allowed = ('GM_notes' + os.sep, '.claude' + os.sep, 'Items' + os.sep, 'GM_notes', '.claude', 'Items')
if rel in ('GM_notes', '.claude', 'Items') or rel.startswith(tuple(allowed)):
    sys.exit(0)
print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': 'Writes are restricted to .claude/, GM_notes/, and Items/ only. This file is read-only: ' + rel}))
sys.exit(0)
"
